tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "Block_DNS_Tunnel_UDP_8853"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "UDP_8853"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "Block-DNS-Tunneling-External-DNS"
        set uuid 2f2b6670-335d-51f1-68c8-20eb48ead0fa
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
edit 3
        set name "Block_DNS_Tunnel_UDP_8853"
        set uuid 54b52d0e-335d-51f1-9773-ff80866b0eb0
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "UDP_8853"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
